pair.no_devices: No appliances found yet. Open the app settings and run the one-time Home Connect login first.

error.no_keys: No local keys found for this appliance. Re-pair the app.
error.unreachable: Appliance is unreachable on the local network.
error.unknown_program: That program is not valid for this appliance.
error.remote_start_not_allowed: Remote start is not enabled on the appliance. Enable it on the appliance first.
error.feature_not_supported: This appliance does not support that setting.
error.feature_not_available: That setting is not currently available on the appliance.

settings.title: Home Connect - pair appliances
settings.lead: Use the one-time cloud login to retrieve the local keys for your Bosch/Siemens appliances. After that, the app talks locally and you can block the appliances from the internet. Add discovered appliances via Add device > Home Connect.
settings.login_hint: The SingleKey ID login cannot run inside the app because the login page is protected by hCaptcha. Log in with your own browser instead.
settings.login_step_generate: Generate the login link and open it in your browser, or copy it.
settings.login_step_signin: Log in with SingleKey ID. Your browser will try to open hcauth://auth/prod?code=... and show an error. That is expected.
settings.login_step_paste: Copy the full hcauth:// URL from the address bar or network inspector and paste it below.
settings.import_hint: Already have a devices.json, for example from hcpy? Paste its contents or choose a file.
settings.no_devices: No appliances yet. Log in or import a devices.json.
settings.refresh_hint: Refresh appliances fetches the list again with the saved session. Useful after adding a new appliance.
settings.done_found: __count__ appliance(s) found and saved. Add them via Add device > Home Connect.
settings.import_done: __count__ appliance(s) imported. Add them via Add device > Home Connect.
settings.copy_manually: Select and copy the link manually.
settings.import_empty: Paste or choose a devices.json first.
settings.clear_done: All saved appliances and the session have been cleared.
settings.progress_lookup: Looking up your Home Connect account...
